author: Stefan Imbesi
description: Type @ to open an autocomplete for wikilinks to notes, headings, and blocks. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Stefan Imbesi
manifest.description: Type @ to open an autocomplete for wikilinks to notes, headings, and blocks.
manifest.name: At Link

name: At Link

releases.author: stefan-imbesi
releases.description:
Initial release.

## Features
- Type `@` at the start of a line or after whitespace to open an autocomplete popup for internal links.
- Suggestions from vault files, headings, and block references (blocks with existing `^id` only).
- Selecting a suggestion replaces `@query` with a proper wikilink:
  - File → `[[Note Title]]`
  - Heading → `[[Note Title#Heading]]`
  - Block → `[[Note Title#^blockid]]`
- Ranking: exact prefix → case-insensitive prefix → fuzzy subsequence.
- Space or Esc closes the popup and leaves the `@` intact.

## Install (manual)
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below, and copy them to `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/at-link/`. Enable "At Link" in Settings → Community plugins.

## Install (BRAT)
Add `stefan-imbesi/obsidian-at-link` to BRAT.
